fall_of_constanplea.title: The Fall of Constanplea
fall_of_constanplea.author: Scholar Theophanes of Byzantra
fall_of_constanplea.description: A firsthand account of the final siege and fall of Constanplea, written by a survivor of the Kalovar conquest.

origins_of_the_kalovars.title: Origins of the Kalovar People
origins_of_the_kalovars.author: Archivist Demetrios Palaiologos
origins_of_the_kalovars.description: A scholarly history of the Kalovar people — from nomadic clans on the steppes north of Yixuan to the rulers of a world empire.

new_order_of_kostantora.title: The New Order: Life in Kostantora
new_order_of_kostantora.author: Miriam of the Lower City
new_order_of_kostantora.description: A personal account of life in Kostantora fifteen years after the conquest — the slave markets, religious imposition, and daily survival.

chronicles_of_byzantra.title: Chronicles of Byzantra
chronicles_of_byzantra.author: The Byzantra Academy of History
chronicles_of_byzantra.description: A concise history of the Byzantra Empire, from the first Basileus Konrad the Unifier to the fall of Basileus Konstantinos IX.

kalovar_faith_and_law.title: The Faith and Law of the Kalovanim Empire
kalovar_faith_and_law.author: Imperial Office of Trade and Foreign Relations
kalovar_faith_and_law.description: An official Kalovar guide for foreign visitors — customs, laws, and strongly-worded advice on not discussing the city's prior history.

warriors_code_of_byzantra.title: The Warrior's Code of Byzantra
warriors_code_of_byzantra.author: General Andronikos Doukas, Commander of the Eastern Legions
warriors_code_of_byzantra.description: A field manual and philosophical treatise on warfare, discipline, and honour, written by one of Byzantra's last great military commanders.

voices_from_the_steppes.title: Voices from the Steppes
voices_from_the_steppes.author: Compiled by Travelling Scholar Erasimos
voices_from_the_steppes.description: A rare collection of Kalovar oral poems, songs, and tales gathered from steppe wanderers — a window into the soul of a people the world feared.

the_merchants_road.title: The Merchant's Road: A Traveller's Guide to the Known World
the_merchants_road.author: Niketas the Far-Wanderer
the_merchants_road.description: A practical guide to trade routes, city markets, bandit territories, and useful phrases in six languages. Worn and heavily annotated.

last_basileus.title: The Last Basileus: A Life of Konstantinos IX
last_basileus.author: Lady Eudokia Asanina, Court Historian
last_basileus.description: A biography of Byzantra's final emperor — his campaigns, his impossible choices, and his death on the walls of Constanplea.

river_kingdoms_of_yixuan.title: The River Kingdoms of Yixuan
river_kingdoms_of_yixuan.author: Scholar Periandros of Nikomedeia
river_kingdoms_of_yixuan.description: A geographic and cultural survey of the eastern continent — its river kingdoms, peoples, trade goods, and everything a western traveller gets wrong before going.

tales_of_the_jade_court.title: Tales of the Jade Court
tales_of_the_jade_court.author: Scholar-Merchant Alexandros Katakalon
tales_of_the_jade_court.description: Stories, parables, and histories from the eastern kingdoms — clever ministers, ghostly rivers, the secret of silk, and the art of the great examination.

songs_of_the_northern_clans.title: Songs of the Northern Clans
songs_of_the_northern_clans.author: Borderman Dmitrios Ouroumenos
songs_of_the_northern_clans.description: Barbarian sagas, battle chants, and hearth tales of the Varak Confederation — collected by a scholar raised on both sides of the border.

the_iron_horde.title: The Iron Horde: Rise of the Barbarian Chieftains
the_iron_horde.author: Archivist Nikephoros of the Byzantra Military Academy
the_iron_horde.description: A military history of the Varak Confederation Wars — the northern incursions, the Bardanes disaster, and the treaty that finally held. History from both sides of the border.

eastern_alchemists_compendium.title: The Eastern Alchemist's Compendium
eastern_alchemists_compendium.author: Scholar-Physician Kallikrates, translated from Master Shén Wúxiǎo
eastern_alchemists_compendium.description: Medicines, preparations, and philosophy of Yixuan healing arts — a western physician's honest account of an eastern tradition that works better than he expected.

origin_of_eldermoor.title: The Origin of Eldenmoor
origin_of_eldermoor.author: High Archivist Selenne of the Order of the Unbroken Seal
origin_of_eldermoor.description: A sacred transcription of the Primordial Scriptures — ancient texts believed to record how Andrew, the Primordial One, created all of existence using words and commands that no living scholar has ever been able to fully decipher.

origia_first_settlement.title: Origia: A History of the First Settlement
origia_first_settlement.author: Chronicler Aldus Vren, Royal Surveyor, Third Grade
origia_first_settlement.description: A Bureau of Historical Records account of the village known to most as Starting Village — its true name, its founding, its notable residents, and why the world insists on forgetting what it is actually called.

waymarks_and_namings.title: Waymarks and Namings: A Lexicon of Western Place Names
waymarks_and_namings.author: Scholar Petronis of the Cartographers' Guild
waymarks_and_namings.description: The Cartographers' Guild's official lexicon of place names in the western territories, including long-overdue corrections to several embarrassing errors — among them the matter of Origia.
